_description: DNOS version compatibility knowledge base. Maps CLI commands/features to the version they were introduced. Used by scaler-wizard to warn about incompatible config during upgrades and to drive the config sanitizer.
_sources: DNOS CLI RST documentation (Command History sections)

version_timeline._note: Ordered list of known major DNOS releases. Used to compare source vs target.

releases.notes: Removed NCC option from IPMI shell
SSH accepted-public-key-algorithms, system profile, grpc TLS enhancements
FlowSpec-VPN wbox side, new route-policy language

system.ssh.security.accepted_public_key_.description: SSH server public key algorithm selection
system.ssh.security.accepted_public_key_.discovered_via: RST Command History + live test on RR-SA-2 (19.2.13.1 rejected it)

system.ssh.security.ciphers.discovered_via: RST Command History (25.1) + live test RR-SA-2

system.ssh.security.host_key_algorithms.description: SSH server host key algorithm selection
system.ssh.security.host_key_algorithms.discovered_via: RST Command History (25.1) + live test RR-SA-2

system.ssh.security.key_exchange_algorit.discovered_via: RST Command History (25.1) + live test RR-SA-2

system.ssh.security.macs.discovered_via: RST Command History (25.1) + live test RR-SA-2

system.ssh.security_block.description: Entire SSH security block (all children are 25.1+). Safe to strip as block when downgrading below 25.1.
system.ssh.security_block.discovered_via: All children introduced in 25.1/25.4; no children exist in 19.x

system.grpc_block.description: gRPC server config. Present since 19.2 but TLS sub-commands (server-certificate, client-authentication) added later. Some TLS children not portable across major versions.
system.grpc_block.discovered_via: RST docs + live test: 19.2.13.1 rejected grpc TLS server-certificate

system.grpc.tls.server_certificate.discovered_via: RST docs + live test on RR-SA-2

system.login.ipmi_block.description: IPMI user config under system login. Encrypted passwords are not portable across major versions (password hash format changes).
system.login.ipmi_block.portability_note: Block exists in all versions, but encrypted-password values are not portable. Strip when crossing major version boundaries.
system.login.ipmi_block.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 rejected encrypted-password from 25.4.x config

version_notes.19.x: Present but format may differ from 25.x saved config

system.cli_timestamp.discovered_via: RST Command History (11.4) + live test: 19.2.13.1 rejected cli-timestamp from 25.4.x config

system.timing_mode.portability_note: Config syntax changed between major versions. May fail on downgrade even though command exists in both versions.
system.timing_mode.discovered_via: Live test on RR-SA-2: 19.2.13.1 rejected timing-mode from 25.4.x

system.profile_default.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 does not have 'profile' command

protocols.bgp.nsr.description: BGP Non-Stop Routing (NSR). Present since 19.2 but config format differs between major versions. Not portable across major jumps.
protocols.bgp.nsr.portability_note: Command exists in 19.2+ but the parameter format changed. Stripping is safer than risking a parse error on target version.
protocols.bgp.nsr.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 rejected 'bgp nsr enabled' from 25.4.x config

system.logging.suppress_event_list.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 does not have suppress-event-list

system.logging.timestamp_format_block.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 does not have timestamp-format block

system.logging.utc_normalize.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 does not have utc-normalize

qos.hw_mapping.queue_size.speed_ranges_b.description: QoS hardware queue size speed ranges configuration
qos.hw_mapping.queue_size.speed_ranges_b.discovered_via: Live test: 19.2.13.1 does not have speed-ranges

system.login.user.role_techsupport.description: User with role techsupport. The 'techsupport' role does not exist in versions before 25.4.

ethernet_oam.cfm.linktrace.description: CFM on-demand linktrace (operational command, not config). Not relevant for config sanitization but useful for feature availability checks.

upgrade_warnings._note: Version-pair-specific warnings shown to user before upgrade. Key format: 'source_major.minor -> target_major.minor'

25.4 -> 19.2.warning_message: Downgrade from 25.4 to 19.2 removes SSH security algorithms, system profile, gRPC TLS, QoS speed-ranges, logging enhancements, and BGP NSR format. Config will be automatically sanitized before restore.

25.1 -> 19.2.warning_message: Downgrade from 25.1 to 19.2 removes SSH security algorithms, gRPC TLS, QoS speed-ranges, and logging enhancements.

26.x -> 25.x.warning_message: Downgrade from 26.x to 25.x. New route-policy language features may not be backward-compatible. Config sanitization will handle known incompatibilities.

19.x -> 25.x.warning_message: Upgrade from 19.x to 25.x. No config stripping needed (new version accepts old config). New features will need manual configuration after upgrade.

collapsible_parents._note: Config blocks that should be removed if they become empty after sanitization.

password_portability._note: Encrypted password hashes are not portable across major DNOS versions. The hashing algorithm or salt format may change.
password_portability.recommendation: Strip encrypted-password lines when crossing major version boundaries. User must reconfigure passwords on target version.
